name: io.github.hostsmith/mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Hostsmith hosting platform. Manage sites, domains, and deploy files from any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: HOSTSMITH_PARTITION
environmentVariables.description: Default data partition: 'us' (United States) or 'eu' (European Union).

environmentVariables.name: HOSTSMITH_API_DOMAIN
environmentVariables.description: Override the upstream API domain across both partitions; 'us.api.' and 'eu.api.' are prepended to this value.

environmentVariables.name: HOSTSMITH_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL for a single partition (ignores HOSTSMITH_PARTITION).
